sourceAuthorityBoundary: This registry is execution metadata for future read-model validation only. Tree-native selected-slice artifacts and canonical .pbe artifacts remain current operational source unless a separate source-authority decision changes that boundary.
nonPromotionStatement: Registry inclusion is not Graph-source promotion, source authority expansion, CI enforcement, or user acceptance.
mutationBoundary: Future parsers may read and normalize this registry, but validation commands must not silently mutate it. Registry edits require an explicit reviewed config update.
